name: Condemnation: Languid

effects.text: put this card on this vampire

text:
+1 stealth action. Condemnation.
[pre] Ⓓ Lock a younger vampire.
[dai] Requires an infernal vampire. Ⓓ Put this card on a ready minion. The attached minion gets -1 strength. Burn all other condemnation cards on this minion.
[DAI] As [dai] above, and the attached minion cannot press in combat.
